subject: Re: The dautoalign4warp didn't generate the xf file
body:
Hi  Alister,

I am also trying to go through the tutorial  *https://teamtomo.org/walkthrough/EMPIAR-10164/ 
<https://teamtomo.org/walkthrough/EMPIAR-10164/>*

When I try to align the tilt series with dautoalign, first I got the 
"-UnbinnedPixelSize" error. Then I comment it out in the script. Now 
everything looks fine but it just don't generate the stack file. I didn't  
see any critical errors in the log, could you please take a look. 

Thank you so much for any comments!

Best,

Huabin
